message:
fix(determinism): migrate HashMap → DetHashMap and harden DetHasher for portable hashing

det_hash.rs:
- Replace `as u8`/`as u16`/etc casts in signed→unsigned write methods with
  cast_unsigned() which is the idiomatic Rust way to express the transmute and
  avoids any future clippy lint about lossy casts (the semantics are identical
  but the intent is clearer)

epoch.rs:
- Replace std HashMap with DetHashMap for Epoch metadata — epoch metadata
  iteration order must be deterministic for snapshot comparison and replay
  fidelity across lab runs

h2/stream.rs:
- Replace std HashMap with DetHashMap for the StreamStore streams map — while
  H2 stream IDs are numeric and iteration order rarely matters in production,
  deterministic iteration is required for lab-mode replay of H2 connections

remote.rs:
- Replace std HashMap with DetHashMap for IdempotencyStore entries — the store
  is designed for single-threaded lab use where deterministic purge/eviction
  ordering ensures reproducible deduplication behavior

lab/runtime.rs:
- Replace DefaultHasher (which is NOT stable across Rust versions) with
  DetHasher for LabConfigSummary::config_hash() — this ensures the same lab
  configuration produces the same hash regardless of Rust toolchain version,
  which is critical for cache keying and cross-version result comparison

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
